name: IntroGuardUIPolish
notes: Touch-primes the intro video from the start button, treats zero start time as invalid so the 3-second minimum cannot be skipped, and further tightens lobby/settings/popup copy fit.
label: Intro video guard, copy fit, and UI polish
description: Game start uses only the intro video as the loading surface. The video is primed from the user tap, stays visible for at least 3 seconds, and remains until assets are ready.
